Registry of Imperial Decrees

Codex Scribae • Sanctum of Law

Decree #882-S 14 Days Past

The Edict of Silentium

Henceforth, any verbalized incantation within the inner sanctum of the Grand Archive is strictly prohibited. Knowledge must be transcribed in silence to prevent the resonance of ancient runes from fracturing the terrestrial foundation.

verified Ratified
category Arcane Safety
person Arch-Scribe Valerius
Decree #912-A 3 Days Past

The Taxation of Soul-Dust

All practitioners of alchemy within the lower districts must surrender 5% of their residual soul-dust to the Imperial Forge. Failure to comply will result in the immediate forfeiture of transmutation licenses.

pending Pending Council Seal
category Economy
person High Overseer Thorne
Decree #741-K Yesterday

Rite of the Lunar Eclipse

During the upcoming alignment, all runic laws concerning shadow-binding are suspended for the duration of the celestial shadow. Specialized units are authorized to harness residual energy for wall-reinforcement.

verified Ratified
category Runic Law
person Lunar Oracle
Draft #99-X In Progress

Expedition to the Hollow Peaks

[Restricted Access] Proposed mandate for the reclamation of the Sunken Spire. Initial drafts suggest a mandatory draft of 300 able-bodied mages for the vanguard...

edit_note Drafting

Showing 4 of 1,248 recorded edicts
